so we can officially make the viral dot cake at home and it’s my new favorite little treat 🧁🌈 Ingredients: 1 box @Funfetti cake mix 3 eggs 1 cup water 1/2 cup oil funfetti vanilla frosting rainbow nonpareils sprinkles Instructions: In a large mixing bowl, mix cake mix, eggs, water, and oil until well combined and transfer to a greased square baking pan. Bake at 350° for 35-40 minutes, covering with foil halfway through. Allow to cool completely, then press greased ramekin into the center and twist to remove. Allow mini cake to slide out of ramekin and slice through the center to create 2 layers. Place bottom layer back in ramekin, top with a layer of frosting, then place top layer of cake with another layer of frosting spread evenly to the edges. Cover in rainbow nonpareils, allow to chill and slightly harden in the fridge, then take a center bite and enjoy! 😋 #cake #Recipe #baking #dessert #creatorsearchinsights

South Korea's highest-paid math tutor makes $14 million a year, more than Son Heung-min, their most famous footballer. His name is Hyun Woo-jin. He graduated from Stanford's math department in three years and three months. His textbook series, Neuron, sells over a million copies a year. Every November, South Korea pauses for a single nine-hour exam called the Suneung. The Air Force halts training flights. For 35 minutes during the English listening section, no commercial flights can take off or land at Incheon, one of Asia's busiest airports. About 8,000 police officers escort late students on motorcycles with sirens running. Inside that exam, the most consequential questions are called killer questions. They're deliberately designed to fall outside the public school curriculum. They exist to separate the top one percent from everyone else, because that one percent gets into Seoul National, Korea, and Yonsei. The SKY universities that produce around 30% of Korea's top-1,000-company CEOs. Parents can't evaluate the curriculum themselves. They can't reverse-engineer the killer question. So they borrow Hyun Woo-jin's judgment. If your child went through Neuron and still failed, you did what every reasonable parent in the neighborhood does. The fault is your child's, or fate's. Not yours. That's what's actually being sold. Not math. Certainty. Korean households spent 29.2 trillion won on private tutoring in 2024, an all-time record, even as the school-age population dropped another 1.5%. A country is, in a measurable sense, choosing not to exist in order to keep paying for that certainty.

In the One Piece Episode 1163, titled “I Want You to Praise Me - The Reunion of Robin and Saul,” One Piece delivered one of the most emotional reunions in the entire series as Robin finally reunited with Saul after 22 years of pain, loneliness, and survival. The little girl who once lost everything in Ohara finally broke down in tears in front of the man who first told her she deserved to live. When Robin asked, “Can you praise me for holding out this long?”, it felt like decades of heartbreak and silent suffering came pouring out at once. Seeing the Straw Hats cry beside her while Saul stood there alive again made this moment unforgettable for every One Piece fan.#onepiece1163 #robin #luffy #nicorobin #onepiece

yummy #junkfood #processedfood #sugar #slop ever have one of those days where you wake up thinking it’s going to be simple, calm, maybe even boring… and then the universe decides to roll out a full-on spectacle? Not a disaster. Not a tragedy. Just a slow, creeping chaos that nudges your plans off the table until all you can do is shrug and say, “Okay… let’s dance.” It’s like suddenly you’re the lead in a story you didn’t audition for. You were just trying to exist quietly, keep to your lane, maybe sip your coffee in peace. And then—bam—a whirlwind of people, events, and random coincidences crashes in. Everything ordinary turns loud, confusing, and somehow hilarious. There’s always that presence. The one that doesn’t leave, no matter how much you wish they would. Persistent, annoying, impossible to ignore. They challenge your patience, test your limits, make you laugh when you least expect it. And slowly, almost imperceptibly, they start to shift the world around you. Things feel lighter. Moments feel brighter. Walls you built begin to crumble. Then comes the unexpected twist. The one that doesn’t fit neatly into your plan, your comfort zone, your carefully curated life. They see past the surface—the tired, guarded exterior—and into the heart underneath. They don’t soften the chaos, they exist within it, and in doing so, force you to see yourself differently. Vulnerable, messy, real. It’s terrifying. It’s exhilarating. It’s alive. We all have our “safe corners,” spaces where the world feels predictable and quiet. But staying there too long? That’s not living. Growth waits in the interruptions, the detours, the moments that throw your day off balance. You don’t need to have a plan. You just need to keep showing up, keep opening doors, keep letting the story surprise you. Life isn’t linear. It’s a winding path of unexpected encounters, awkward coincidences, and loud, uninvited chaos. Some pass through and leave only echoes. Others stay long enough to shift the story, maybe even change it. And all of it—the frustration, the wonder, the laughter, the heartbreak—is yours. It shapes the narrative that only you can tell. So if today feels like a musical number you didn’t ask for, remember: you don’t need everything neat, perfect, or polished. You just need to move forward, to stumble, to dance a little, to let the interruptions in. Because in that chaos, in the mess, in the unplanned moments… that’s where you find the parts of yourself you didn’t know were waiting. And maybe, somewhere in all of it, you discover the story that’s truly yours—wild, imperfect, messy, and unforgettable. #targetaudience

bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

Le chirurgien plasticien José Soler-Baillo, qui exerce à Miami, est devenu viral après la publication de vidéos filmées pendant ses opérations. En plein bloc opératoire, il s’ambiance sur de la house. Une pratique courante chez certains chirurgiens, car la diffusion de musique peut favoriser la concentration et créer un climat de travail plus détendu. Cependant, il est beaucoup plus rare de voir des images tournées pendant les opérations être publiées sur les réseaux sociaux. Crédit : @drsolerbaillo / IG

What Your Cat Thinks When You Leave Every time you walk out the door, your cat has no idea where you're going. They don't know what work or school is. To them, you're out hunting and they're just hoping you make it back safe. And the longer you're gone, the more they feel it. Cats are way more attached to you than most people think. They just show it in tiny quiet ways. If you have a cat, make sure someone checks on them when you're away for more than a day. They need more than just food and water. #cats #catbehavior #catstiktok #catfacts #PetsOfTikTok

Are they really back? Yes, absolutely. We exclusively tested both new Mercurial models in Madrid (thanks to @Nike Football and @hubcommnet), as always, we want to give you every possible detail to build your own opinion: visuals, product insights, but most importantly our real feedback after using them on pitch, in matches and during specific training sessions that seriously “stressed” both boots. The new Superfly sends a very clear message as soon as you put it on: innovation built to deliver maximum propulsion. That’s exactly what the forefoot “plate” gives you, an aggressive sense of push and energy return that you can genuinely feel while sprinting. Vapor changes too and the almost “strange” feeling when wearing it for the first time is actually maximum comfort. Not because Mercurial Vapor has never been comfortable, but comfort has probably never been the first thing that comes to mind when thinking about this boot. Other details you’ll definitely want to know: Vapor is the lightest Mercurial ever made at just 130g, while Superfly features a very grippy upper despite being a product fully focused on speed and sprinting. Sizing? Stay relaxed with your usual Nike size, this is 100% true to size. We have a lot more content directly filmed in Madrid coming very soon, so as always, feel free to leave your questions in the comments. There’s a lot more coming... #bootsculture #NikeMercurial #Mercurial #footballboots

Recipe below!👇🏼Why spend at M&S when you can make it at home and even better 🍓☀️ ⭐️ Ingredients: - 6-8 fresh strawberries (preferably similar size) - 4 slices of soft white bread (crustless milk bread if possible) - 200ml double cream - 2 tbsp sugar - 1/2 tsp vanilla extract (optional) ⭐️ Method： 1. Wash strawberries. 2. Beat heavy cream with sugar (and vanilla if using) until stiff peaks form. 3. Spread whipped cream on bread, place strawberries, cover with more cream, and top with another bread slice. 4. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap and chill for 30 minutes. 5. Slice cleanly and enjoy! #sando #strawberrysando #strawberries #strawberriesandcream #aesthetic #trending #marksandspencer #viral #fyp #baking #baketok #dessert #explore #Recipe #EasyRecipe

Ooey-Gooey Scoopable Nutella Cookie Pie🤤 Yields: 15-16 Chunky Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •Cut cling wrap into small squares. Scoop ½ teaspoon Nutella onto individual cling-wrap squares. Fold to seal and freeze until solid. (Repeat for however many Nutella stuffed cookies you plan to make.) •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 90g balls. Press a frozen Nutella piece into the centre of each dough ball, seal well, and roll into a smooth ball. •Place the stuffed cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 180°C (350°F). •Take any shape baking dish circle, square, rectangle anything and line it with parchment paper. Arrange frozen cookie dough balls in it leaving some space between them. •Bake for 10-15 minutes (timing depends on the type of pan) or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft and gooey. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream and chocolate sauce enjoy!✨ NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #nutella #cookiepie #fyp #viral

Classic chocolate chip cookies 🤤 Yields: 15-16 Cookies INGREDIENTS:  230g Cold Chopped Unsalted Butter  160g Caster Sugar  160g Light Brown Sugar  450g Chocolate Chunks or chips  475g Plain Flour  1 tsp Salt 3 tsp Baking Powder  3/4 tsp Baking Soda  2 Eggs  1 Egg Yolk  1 tsp Vanilla  INSTRUCTIONS: •In a large mixing bowl, add the cold cubed butter and whisk until slightly creamy. Add the white sugar and light brown sugar, then whisk together until well combined and fluffy. •Add the eggs, vanilla extract, and chocolate chips or chunks. Whisk until fully incorporated. •Add the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Gently mix until just combined, do not overmix. •Portion the dough into 75-80g balls. •Place the cookie dough balls onto a tray and freeze for at least 30 minutes (or overnight for best results). •Preheat oven to 165-170C. Bake for 10-15 minutes or until the tops are lightly golden while the centres remain soft. •Remove from the oven and let cool slightly. •Serve warm with ice cream. NOTE: Store any extra dough balls in an airtight container or freezer bag and freeze for later. Whenever a cookie craving hits, bake straight from frozen🫶🏻 #cookie #chocolate #fyp #explorepage✨ #viralvideos

매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood
